rationale: Cursor map function applied twice when used as ReadStream; internal implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Documentation improvement for unified topology options; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Dependency fix for older Node versions; CI/build issue, no spec involvement.
Improvement implementing new SDAM spec feature (topologyVersion, stale error handling); driver not previously wrong, spec added new requirement.
Server selection spec requires Unknown topology to return empty set; readPreferenceServerSelector failed to short-circuit on Unknown topology.
Documentation copy-paste error for aggregate collation option; docs bug, no spec deviation.
Server session acquired eagerly per operation rather than lazily; performance/resource optimization, no specific spec rule violated.
util.promisify not available in older Node versions; CI/compatibility breakage, no spec involvement.
Node.js-specific promiseLibrary option not honoured after internal refactor; no cross-driver spec rule involved.
language_override option regression in text index creation; implementation regression, no specific spec rule names this behavior.
SDAM spec requires ServerDescription update on every isMaster response; equals() ignores lastWriteDate/lastUpdateTime causing stale server selection.
createCollection helper always runs listCollections regardless of strict mode; internal helper logic bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Memory leak with ReplSet due to Node 12 removing _called property; implementation/compatibility bug, no spec rule involved.
Null pointer on isDirty after session ends; implementation crash, no specific sessions spec rule violated.
Server selection spec defines maxStalenessSeconds as required ReadPreference option; ReadPreference.fromOptions fails to extract it from options.
hasNext on cursor with limit incorrectly consumes limit entries; regression bug, no specific cursor spec rule naming this behavior.
Connection string spec: single readPreferenceTags instance must parse as array of one; driver parses it as plain object instead.
Null dereference crash in processWaitQueue when server comes back up; implementation crash, no specific SDAM spec rule violated.
CMAP Connection missing host/port properties needed by Kerberos module; implementation omission, CMAP spec does not mandate host/port properties on connection object.
withTransaction crashes on promise rejected with empty reason; edge case implementation bug, spec does not specify handling of undefined rejection values.
crc32 function undefined in deserializer; internal implementation bug, no BSON spec rule violated.
BSON spec defines Long serialization; outer condition prevents inner Long/Double logic from executing, causing Long to serialize as Double.
Adding BigInt support to BSON; new feature improvement, driver not previously doing anything wrong per spec.
Removing fnv1a from ObjectId since spec never used it; cleanup of unused implementation, not a spec deviation.
Using server error codes instead of messages; improvement in error handling, thin description via DRIVERS-1323 reference.
BSON bundle uses undefined 'global' in browser context; packaging/compatibility bug, no spec involvement.
Incorrect ESM bundle imports due to rollup-plugin-commonjs bug; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Adding $uuid extended JSON parsing for binary subtype 4; Improvement implementing new spec feature, driver not previously wrong.
Template string not used in SSL error message; minor code quality bug, no spec involvement.
Not Master error on createIndex in 3.6.0 regression; user-reported regression, insufficient internal detail to identify specific spec rule violated.
Cursor documentation improvements; docs only, no spec deviation.
Internal refactor moving hasNext to core cursor; code organization, no behavior change or spec violation.
API ergonomics: restrict promiseLibrary to MongoClient only; no spec rule involved.
Remove ES6 destructuring syntax from 3.6 branch for older Node compatibility; build/syntax fix, no spec involvement.
Missing TypeScript function overload for EJSON.stringify; TypeScript typing bug, no BSON spec deviation.
Child ticket of DRIVERS-1249; updating SDAM monitoring tests with directConnection URI option, not fixing driver behavior.
Using peerDependenciesMeta for optional peer dependencies; packaging/npm metadata change, no spec involvement.
ignoreUndefined option not applied to findOneAndReplace/findOneAndModify; driver-specific option, no CRUD spec rule mandates ignoreUndefined behavior.
Deprecating geoHaystack and geoSearch per DRIVERS-987; planned deprecation improvement, not a nonconformance.
GSSAPI auth causes crashes in Compass due to concurrent authentication calls; concurrency implementation bug, no specific GSSAPI spec rule violated.
Performance regression from setImmediate usage; perf issue, no spec involvement.
Object.apply typo instead of Object.assign makes username unpassable for X509 auth; spec requires username to be usable for X509 authentication.
Pound sign in URI password breaks parsing; resolved as Done (docs update only), RFC3986 requires percent-encoding; no driver code fix made.
Deprecating topology events on Db object; API ergonomics change, no spec rule involved.
Updating help/issues documentation links; docs maintenance via DRIVERS-1180, no spec involvement.
Renaming BulkWriteError to MongoBulkWriteError for consistency with other error types; API naming refactor, no spec rule violated.
Docs reference wrong MongoClient.open instead of MongoClient.connect; documentation error only.
Legacy topology hangs after socketTimeoutMS defaulted to 0; test/compatibility issue from behavior change, no spec rule violated.
BSON missing default export for TypeScript import; module packaging issue, no BSON spec deviation.
Binary inspect method output not re-evaluable; developer experience bug, no BSON spec rule governs inspect representation.
